author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented gradcheck() in ferrotorch-core/src/autograd/gradcheck.rs. Uses central finite differences (f(x+eps)-f(x-eps))/(2*eps) compared against analytical autograd gradients. Auto-tunes eps/atol/rtol for f32 vs f64 precision. Exported from ferrotorch_core::autograd::gradcheck. 4 tests pass (sum_of_squares, linear_combination, add, non-scalar rejection).
